description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a publish stage and includes two jobs: hub_meltano and publish. The hub_meltano job runs on the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, sets variables DOCKERFILE, DOCKER_DRIVER, IMAGE_NAME, IMAGE_TAG, SOURCE_IMAGE, logs in to Docker Hub using $DOCKER_HUB_USER and $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD, pulls $SOURCE_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG$IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX, tags it as $IMAGE_NAME:$IMAGE_TAG$IMAGE_TAG_SUFFIX and pushes, then repeats the pull/tag/push for the latest tag, and it only runs on version tags (via .only:version-tags). The publish job uses the image $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG with an empty entrypoint, runs a before_script to pip install poetry, then creates a symlink with ln -s /meltano/dist and executes poetry publish, also limited to version tags. Both jobs inherit any parallel image‑tag‑suffix logic from .parallel:image_tag_suffix and no caches or artifacts are defined.
